title: safeguarding — data retention windows
description: Legal-hold module. Every incident record is retained for the STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS of the involved incident type (up to indefinite for child protection escalations). StaffCheck rows retained 7yr post-expiry for compliance audit.

policies.description: Externally-escalated incidents retained indefinitely under legal-hold. NEVER purged.

conditions: escalated_to IS NULL AND severity IN ('low', 'medium')
escalated_to IS NULL AND severity IN ('high', 'critical')

policies.description: Attachments follow parent incident retention. Cold-tier storage after 1yr.

legal_hold_exception: Any incident escalated to external authorities OR involving a minor's safety marks the entire incident chain (incident + attachments + access grants + linked messages) as legal-hold. Legal-hold records are NEVER deleted regardless of tenant termination — they persist under Stackra's compliance obligation to authorities.
